items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Critical Remote Code Execution -- Actively Exploited High EPSS CVE-2017-0199
id: bec066d3-f1e6-5130-8cff-751781398ace
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2017-0199 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: CRITICAL | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2017-0199
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/30
modified: 2026/05/30
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: critical
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2017-0199 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-05-30T21:10:33Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2017-0199", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2017-0199 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:6611629; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-05-30, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.apex_ai_summary: [P1] CVE / Vulnerability - high severity (Risk 7.9/10). EPSS 94.3% exploitation probability (30-day forecast). MITRE ATT&CK mapped: Application Layer Protocol, Exploit Public-Facing Application, Command and Scripting Interpreter, Exploitation for Client Execution (4 techniques). Actor attribution: CDB-CYB-01. AI confidence: MODERATE (64%) - partial intelligence corroboration.

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Critical Security Vulnerability -- Actively Exploited High EPSS CVE-2014-6271
id: c30c1b3d-da35-5014-a721-df25c5cd6c82
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2014-6271 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: CRITICAL | Class: KEV_EXPLOIT
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2014-6271
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/30
modified: 2026/05/30
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: critical
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2014-6271 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-05-30T21:10:33Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2014-6271", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2014-6271 Exploitation Attempt - KEV_EXPLOIT"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:7837891; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-05-30, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

status: experimental

    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2021-22204 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.

references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2021-22204
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/30
modified: 2026/05/30
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: critical
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2021-22204 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-05-30T21:10:33Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2021-22204", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Critical Remote Code Execution -- Actively Exploited High EPSS CVE-2022-28368
id: 6144a047-b46c-5d01-b706-d1dd7e2c3c91
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2022-28368 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: CRITICAL | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2022-28368
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/30
modified: 2026/05/30
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: critical
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2022-28368 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-05-30T21:10:33Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2022-28368", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
